name: Corn Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Teaspoon dried minced onion or 2 tablespoons fresh onion, minced
2 Cups cooked corn (fresh, frozen, or canned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cracker crumbs and 6 tablespoons butter. Press into a glass pie plate, reserving 1/2 cup for later.
2. Melt the remaining butter (4 tablespoons) in a saucepan. Add flour, seasonings, and onion. Cook until thickened over medium heat, stirring constantly.
3. Gradually add the hot mixture to the eggs. Blend well and add corn.
4. Pour into a lined pie plate or quiche pan on top of crumbs. Sprinkle with the reserved crackers.
5. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes. Let cool for 5 minutes.
6. Cut into wedges. Serves 6.
